{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032401115820BF3DD287EFA020C55F"}"},"total":3864},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7119498017560462113","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"招工啦，待遇优厚，包穿越 包重生 包送系统。由于新生小世界过多，导致穿越者严重不足，所以现招收穿越者，无论男女，无论老少先到先得。点个赞👍🏻就会得到系统！(试一一试，反正不要钱)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1657637413,"group_id":"6867033766410324999","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4E5I7/zK5yZoFOmaNyw62E=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c875240b1f5445989ddb27e56833441f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877159&x-signature=gF%2FakNQhxkiuHj3SAoLKTCZHntM%3D","user_id":"111141104566","user_name":"奔波儿灞（粑粑）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111141104566","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1668999658,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6867033766410324999","book_info":{"abstract":"殷郊一觉醒来，穿越成大商太子，觉醒昏君系统。
“叮！强铲了十万亩良田，昏君积分+9w！”
“叮！强抢了苏妲己，昏君积分+99w！”
帝辛仰天长叹：“我怎么生了这么一个逆子啊！”
不久后。
“大王，太子种出了亩产千斤的食物！”
“大王，太子统一了天下！”
帝辛哈哈大笑：“孤老矣，明日太子登基！”
文武百官：“殿下定然是个明君也！”
